notes: To make units visible add launch option: PROTON_USE_WINED3D11=1 %command%
title: Blitzkrieg 3

notes:
I added this to Launchparameters: PROTON_USE_WINED3D=1 %command% ,
otherwise the units are invisible.  Tested menu ("map") and Gameplay against KI (Missions and Boris Neural KI);  Loading times are a bit longer as on Windows; Gameplay and graphics were similar to Windows, no performance/graphic issues detected;  Crashes when I exit the game but has no negative effect on the game process/save status
title: Blitzkrieg 3
